title: Python 3.14, pygame-ce 2.5.7, SDL, Initialization, and the Main Loop
description: A script imports an incompatible pygame distribution, opens a window during import, ignores failed modules and quit events, presents twice, and never cleans up. Learners cumulatively produce owned runtime and minimal event-update-render loop through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Pin Python 3.14 and released pygame-ce 2.5.7 as a mutually supported stack while distinguishing package name from import name.
Explain how pygame calls into SDL and identify display, event, input, audio, timer, filesystem, and platform boundaries.
Initialize only required modules, inspect failures, create the display before dependent conversions, and preserve causal diagnostics.
